Raw-Hide Gorget  
 


Slot: NECK
AC: 3
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except DWF HFL GNM
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Raw-Hide Gorget

Slot: NECK
AC: 3
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except DWF HFL GNM
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 6 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:2
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 05:20:55
Page Updated:Sat Feb 22nd, 2025

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 100pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 10
[Drops | Recipes | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Cheslin's Illusion Cards
Pixie Tricksters

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Befallen
NPC Name
a lesser mummy - Befallen
an elf skeleton

NPC Name
a gnoll commander - Blackburrow

a Mucktail foreman
a Mucktail miner
a Mucktail rock breaker

a glyphed familiar
a pledge familiar
an initiate familiar

a ghoul - Commonlands

orc legionnaire - Commonlands

orc legionnaire - Crushbone

a zombie sailor

a drowned citizen

Recfek Shralok

a deepwater goblin - Lake Rathetear
an orc warrior

a cinder goblin cleric
a cinder goblin warrior
a cinder goblin wizard
a fire goblin scout

goblin warrior

a rancorous ghast
orc chief

NPC Name
a rotting citizen
a rotting initiate

North Ro

a crypt mummy - North Ro
a desert madman - North Ro

dry bones skeleton - North Ro
Rahotep

a young ice goblin

Qeynos Hills

Misty Storyswapper

South Ro

a desert madman - South Ro
an orc priest

dry bones skeleton - South Ro

# Feb 04 2020 at 12:01 PM Rating: Decent
Twosexxy1
9 posts
YES! confirmed. On the west shore of the lake around Spectre Island of South Ro, is a cropping of 11 an orc warrior and an orc priest with respawn time of around 20 seconds. By the time I loot the 11 kills, they have respawned. Got 2 Raw-Hide Gorgets in a matter of 10 minutes

# Aug 02 2017 at 1:54 PM Rating: Decent
Dourdenn
8 posts
Killed Orc An Orc Warrior in South Ro today.. they re-spawn within 20 seconds.. simply sent pet out to mass kill the re-pop. The orcs spawn on the west side of the specter tower, along the shoreline.. can't miss them.. Took about 25-50 kills to drop 1 gorget.

Dourdenn
Xegony

After 4 days of 3 to 4 hours a day I never seen one there you got lucky. I spent 3 days in Common Lands and moved on to Blightfire Moors and after 8 hours, nothing. The drop rate is ultra rare now if it drops at all.

Got a raw-hide gorget
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2017 at 9:11 PM Rating: Good
Bobbybick
Guru
528 posts
arrycat wrote:
After 4 days of 3 to 4 hours a day I never seen one there you got lucky. I spent 3 days in Common Lands and moved on to Blightfire Moors and after 8 hours, nothing. The drop rate is ultra rare now if it drops at all.


Yeah with the amount of different types of armor that can drop getting this one particular piece can be tricky/time consuming. I'd suggest trying the undead spire in North Ro as those all respawn very quickly so should be easier to farm rather than hunting down individual legionnaires in Crushbone.
▲ Page top
raw-hide gorget
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2016 at 12:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1705277792339
4 posts
After slaughtering mucktail caves/camps several times in Blightfire, i decided to try S Ro and advice from previous post the beach around the lake. The spot is great to kill orcs cause they spawn very quickly the only problem is after an hour the gorget hadn't dropped. So i moved lil west to the ruin and nuked anything that moved via closest npc target button, dropped from a dry bones skelly. I am not sure if they changed who drops it, if its that rare, or the skelly had killed an orc and looted his bags.

▲ Page top
raw-hide gorget

After slaughtering mucktail caves/camps several times in Blightfire, i decided to try S Ro and advice from previous post the beach around the lake. The spot is great to kill orcs cause they spawn very quickly the only problem is after an hour the gorget hadn't dropped. So i moved lil west to the ruin and nuked anything that moved via closest npc target button, dropped from a dry bones skelly. I am not sure if they changed who drops it, if its that rare, or the skelly had killed an orc and looted his bags.



I believe it's a random drop off any mob within a certain level range.

Can confirm. In about 10 minutes of killing orcs west of specter island on the beach, I got 3 gorgets to drop. This after chasing guard cheslin around picking up his crap for about 4 hours . . .

Raw-hide Gorget
QuoteReply
# May 04 2019 at 9:45 AM Rating: Decent
Monsieur Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
It's posts like these that make reading posts worthwhile. Yes, the orcs along the shore of the oasis are a raw-hide producing machine. I got like 100+ pieces in about an hour; several of the pieces were gorgets.

Thank you again for your find & and your post!
▲ Page top
Raw-hide Gorget
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2015 at 2:18 AM Rating: Decent
Temperance
View User Forum
Scholar
514 posts
Yes! Exactly!
Oasis of Marr - now South Ro - orcs on shore surrounding specter island.
The quarter of the coast from due west of the island to due north has 11 orcs that respawn in about 30-35 seconds! I killed 550 just doing these 11 over and over, some times breaking it up by grabbing extras orcs or other mobs.
10 raw-hide gorgets! Not bad work for half an hour!

I do this at bard speed playing a melody of 1 AE song for agro with a low level tank merc set on Aggressive to do the dirty work and beat the restart of the cycle. You can whack-an-orc yourself or if you are a pet class then F8 + /pet attack is easy also (my SK's preferred method for gray cons).

Bring alts / guidies / whomever for orcish Skill / Special Slayer achievements.
____________________________
~ Muse Temperance the Elf
~ Lyricist of <Mystic Coercion> on Erollisi Marr
~ with a <Variety> of alts to keep me busy

# Jan 08 2015 at 7:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1716768968665
1 post
I just spent nearly 4 hours in South Ro and was able to get everything EXCEPT gorget to drop. I finally went to The MAGLO website and looked up the drop rate on these and saw that the highest droprate was 33% on ghouls in neriak third gate and thought what the hell I'm a high elf cleric worshipping Tunare I couldn't possibly make the dark elves hate me even more so I ran to the SK guild in neriak third gate and killed as many ghoils as I could find...dropped on my sixth kill...

QuoteReply
# May 06 2014 at 7:27 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
7 posts
It does drop but I do think the rate was chopped to next to nothing.

Killed mucktails and my toon went from 20 to 28 and not a single piece of raw-hide armor dropped.

Went to South Ro and hunted anything humanoid I could for 4 hours and one came off of a dervish, Then spent 3 hours just west of the lake constantly killing orcs. I've had 5+ of every piece of raw-hide armor except the gorget.

I spent close to 14 hours camping this and only had one drop. This is a drop rate that is even better than some highly sought after items, heck, the guise of the hunter was easier to farm than this!

▲ Page top
Head to South Ro
QuoteReply
# May 19 2006 at 3:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592283518925
Scholar
113 posts
After trying to get this in a few different spots, South Ro definitely seems to be the best place to farm this and any raw-hide drops. There is a specific camp of orcs that drop raw-hide about 50% of the time.

If you go to the northern part of the zone and along the western side of the lake, there are about 10-15 orc spawns. Kill those until you get what you want. They respawn in 15-20 seconds, and it only took me about 10 minutes of killing until I had the gorget (along with all the other raw-hide armor pieces).
▲ Page top
Head to South Ro
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2006 at 12:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756782046
9 posts
Like the poster above (DJPhil) I also spent a lot of time trying to find this. The loc for this camp helped a lot... 3 kills later I had my gorget.

Thanks!!
▲ Page top
RE: Head to South Ro
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2006 at 2:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592276552918

Was looking for a gorget for my tailoring trophy, very frustrating. This is good info, took no time at all.

loc of the camp I used was:
pos4130, neg1110
